prose:
The fukui-reactivity task was run on furan using Density Functional Theory (DFT) at the B3LYP/def2-TZVP level of theory (tier `standard`). The calculation was performed in the gas phase with a charge of 0 and a multiplicity of 1.

The most electrophilic site is Carbon atom 5 (0-indexed atom 4) with a Fukui f+ index of 1.9242931.
The most nucleophilic site is Carbon atom 5 (0-indexed atom 4) with a Fukui f- index of 0.1616371.

The full Fukui indices (f+, f-, dual descriptor) for each atom are as follows:
f+: [-1.3316182, 1.2286866, 1.2270264, 1.9233053, 1.9242931, -1.2190639, -1.2191056, -0.76678308, -0.76674059]
f-: [0.08382155, 0.089103093, 0.089304821, 0.161527, 0.1616371, 0.10248412, 0.1025135, 0.10481615, 0.10479266]
Dual Descriptor: [-1.4154398, 1.1395835, 1.1377216, 1.7617783, 1.762656, -1.3215481, -1.321619, -0.87159923, -0.87153325]
The calculation logs are available at `/home/erobles/chem-skills/benchmarks/fidelity/fukui-reactivity-validation/furan/argo_gemini-2.5-flash/20260704-052930_furan_fukui_reactivity/live.out`.
